response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content: a song performance followed by a transition and a talk segment. 2. Identified the song '光のすみか' from on-screen text. 3. Used search tool to find the original artist (Rei Yasuda) and full lyrics. 4. Created scene mapping based on visual cues. 5. Formatted metadata and lyrics into required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a 3D vocal performance of the song 'Hikari no Sumika' followed by a short talk segment by one of the VTubers.

scenes.description: Three VTubers perform a 3D vocal song 'Hikari no Sumika' on stage.
scenes.performer_in_video: 儒烏風亭らでん and others
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
水面に映った藍眩しく揺れる
手探りで探してた足りない私
ゆっくりと動き出した
何万年も前から
この時を約束されていたみたいに
ほら 風は歌い 雨は語り
たどり着くよ 光のすみかへ
幾重にも 重なってるこの 地球の偶然
影の向こう 真実の色
見つけ出すよ 光のすみかを
一つでも欠けていたら
きっと出会えてなかったね
飛べぬまま見上げてた透明な空から
真っ直ぐに差し込んだ優しい朝日
過ぎた季節が歪に削った今という瞬き
どこにも同じものはないの
ほら生きてる証
風は歌い 雨は語り
たどり着くよ 光のすみかへ
幾重にも 重なってるこの 地球の偶然
影の向こう 真実の色
見つけ出すよ 光のすみかを
一つでも欠けていたら
きっと出会えてなかったね
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The blue reflected on the water surface is dazzling and swaying. 
I was searching by feeling my way, an incomplete me.
Slowly, it started to move.
It's as if from tens of thousands of years ago, this moment was promised.
Look, the wind sings, the rain tells a story.
I will arrive, at the habitat of light.
Overlapping in many layers, this coincidence of Earth.
Beyond the shadow, I will find the true color, the habitat of light.
If even one thing was missing, I definitely wouldn't have been able to meet you.
From the transparent sky I looked up at while unable to fly,
the gentle morning sun shone down straight.
The past seasons warped and carved out this moment called 'now'.
There is nothing the same anywhere.
Look, proof that I'm alive.
The wind sings, the rain tells a story.
I will arrive, at the habitat of light.
Overlapping in many layers, this coincidence of Earth.
Beyond the shadow, I will find the true color, the habitat of light.
If even one thing was missing, I definitely wouldn't have been able to meet you.

scenes.description: The stage fades to black and transitions.
A VTuber, Judoufuutei Raden, speaks to the camera in a studio setting.
